facts: 10 sub-datasets each with own natural shift; Koh et al. ICML 2021; v2.0 unlabeled-data extension.
hypotheses: No single method wins across all 10 sub-datasets (the anti-tradeoff hypothesis).
WILDS curation introduces a selection-for-clear-shift bias.
intuitions: WILDS v3 if announced; foundation-model cross-WILDS results 2024-25.
unknowns: Curated-benchmark validity: there is no established framework for how curator choice propagates to settings outside the benchmark.
